task: I need help writing a short text to a teammate after I told them I couldn’t share my answers on a worksheet, and now things feel a little awkward. Can you help me make it sound friendly but still clear?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a friendly, clear text you could send:

**“Hey, I just wanted to say I wasn’t trying to be rude earlier. I just can’t share my answers, but I’m still happy to help you work through it if you want.”**

If you want, I can also make it sound:
- more casual
- more apologetic
- shorter and more text-like

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. It sounds friendly without being weird about it.
